name: wxcode-admin-midnight-ops
title: Midnight Ops
description: Dark navy teal-accent admin aesthetic: midnight-navy canvas (#0b1120), raised cool-grey panels, teal-to-cyan accent gradient (#14b8a6 / #22d3ee), glowing status dots, Inter type with tabular figures, and compact hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = slim navbar (logo + search + context switcher + icon actions + avatar) + compact left icon rail + 4 metric tiles with inline sparklines + full-width time-series area chart + status-list side panel + full-width records table with severity and state pills, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density real-time consoles.

query.en: Apply this dark navy teal-accent admin aesthetic to my domain — midnight canvas, teal-to-cyan accent, slim navbar with context switcher, compact icon rail, 4 metric tiles with sparklines, a time-series area chart, a status-list side panel, and a dense records table with severity and state pills, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个深色海军蓝青色强调风格应用到我的领域：午夜深蓝底色、青色渐变强调色、上下文切换导航栏、紧凑图标侧栏、4 个带趋势迷你图的指标卡片、时间序列面积图、状态列表侧栏，以及带严重级别和状态标签的密集记录表格，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
